def classify(p):
    match p:
        case [x, y] if x == y:
            return 'diagonal'
        case [0, _]:
            return 'on x-axis'
        case [_, 0]:
            return 'on y-axis'
        case _:
            return 'general'

def is_prime(n):
    if n < 2: return False
    d = 2
    while d < n:
        if n % d == 0:
            return False

    result = []
    i = j = 0
    while i < len(a) and j < len(b):
        if a[i] <= b[j]:
            result.append(a[i])
            i += 1
        else:
            result.append(b[j])
            j += 1
    result.extend(a[i:])
    result.extend(b[j:])
    return result
